sections.paragraph:
Ἰουδίθ, ἡindecl. (יְהוּדִית) Judith

① a heroic Israelite (Jdth 8–16) 1 Cl 55:4.

② a servant of Anna GJs 2:2 v.l.; 2:3 v.l.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 479
